originalTitle: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
content: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.

originalTitle: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
title: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
content: Judges handed down sentences ranging from five years to life imprisonment following mass trials.

originalTitle: UK shelves Chagos deal after Trump opposition
title: UK shelves Chagos deal after Trump opposition
content: UK government officials say they are not entirely abandoning the agreement but have run out of time.

originalTitle: Iran’s deputy FM says Tehran has ‘upper hand’ in talks with US
title: Iran’s deputy FM says Tehran has ‘upper hand’ in talks with US
content: Iran’s Gharibabadi says Tehran has entered negotiations from a position of strength and the war on Iran has failed.

originalTitle: US says two naval ships ‘transited’ Strait of Hormuz for mine-clearing
title: US says two naval ships ‘transited’ Strait of Hormuz for mine-clearing
content: Negotiations are ongoing between US-Iranian delegations in Islamabad, with control of the strait a key sticking point.

originalTitle: Pakistan sends fighter jets to Saudi Arabia amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
title: Pakistan sends fighter jets to Saudi Arabia amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
content: Deployment under mutual defence pact comes as Islamabad hosts US-Iran ceasefire talks.

originalTitle: Artemis crew home safely after completing historic mission to the Moon
title: Artemis crew home safely after completing historic mission to the Moon
content: Four astronauts splashed down in the Pacific after a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans.

originalTitle: Knifeman calling himself 'Lucifer' slashes three at NYC's Grand Central
title: Knifeman calling himself 'Lucifer' slashes three at NYC's Grand Central
content: Police fatally shot the assailant after he ignored at least 20 demands to drop the weapon, said NYPD.

originalTitle: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
title: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
content: The Democratic congressman, a leading candidate in the race, has strongly denied the accusations saying he will fight with "facts".

originalTitle: Teenager Ngumoha scores as Liverpool beat Fulham
title: Teenager Ngumoha scores as Liverpool beat Fulham
content: Rio Ngumoha and Mohamed Salah both score in Liverpool's 2-0 victory over Fulham at Anfield.

originalTitle: Scott nets the winner as Bournemouth stun Arsenal
title: Scott nets the winner as Bournemouth stun Arsenal
content: Arsenal's title hopes take a hit as Bournemouth win 2-1 at the Emirates with goals from Junior Kroupi and Alex Scott.

originalTitle: Dewsbury-Hall scores late equaliser as Everton draw at Brentford
title: Dewsbury-Hall scores late equaliser as Everton draw at Brentford
content: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall scores a late equaliser as Everton rescue a point at Brentford after coming from behind twice.
